title: No drop setting videos from me

transcript.text: Hello. This video is to say that I cannot do drop-sitting after all. I'm sorry.
For anybody who saw the other video and said, ooh, let me see what drop-sitting is.
I asked my gym and they said no. Headquarters of 24 Hour Fitness.
Not to knock them, I like 24 Hour Fitness. I work out. I like one in the morning.
I'm so glad that 24 Hour Fitness exists, but I guess there's some kind of legal thing.
That would be cool if somebody else did drop-sitting. That'd be awesome.
Anyway, that's all for now. Bye-bye.
